title: QPE
description: Quantum Phase Estimation (QPE) algorithm is used to estimate the eigenvalues (phases) of unitary operators. It is a core component of many important quantum algorithms (such as Shor's algorithm and HHL algorithm).

params.help: The phase value phi to estimate (0 <= phi < 1). We will construct a phase gate P(2*pi*phi) as the operator to be estimated.
params.name: p
params.info: 请输入浮点数，范围为0到1之间且不包含1（如 0.25）

params.help: The number of ancillary qubits used for phase estimation, which determines the estimation accuracy (1/2^n).
params.name: n
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到10之间（如 3）
